text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... I thought I smelled the sea breeze. Hello,
Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are you talking about me? Do I smell like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You do indeed, like an easterly wind that blows
across the tides.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Is it really that strong?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You're like a gale. It would be impossible not to
notice.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
This is simply my guess, but I imagine everyone at
school feels the same.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, maybe it's because I was hanging around
Golshi while she grilled all those fish!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aagh! What do I do?! I'm supposed to meet Prez
after this! I can't go see her stinking of fish!
